tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I practise speaking English every day. He speaks better than before. If I work hard, I will succeed. He said that he would come soon. Will you meet me today?

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have to read this book. He has been working here for three years. You are a very good person, aren't you? I have confidence in speaking English. I have learned from my mistakes.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "यह शब्द रोज़ के इस्तेमाल के लिए जरूरी है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This word is necessary for daily use.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "He said that he will come soon."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He said that he would come soon.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I express my thoughts clearly. This sentence is with correct grammar. I like learning new vocabulary. Today I learned five new words.
